summary: Comprehensive Slice 3 QA validation complete. All 10 MUST-HAVE items, 5 SHOULD-HAVE items, 5 CROSS-CHECK items, and 3 REGRESSION items verified across 3 login roles (Central Store, Master Store, Outlet). History & Ledger screen at /history fully functional with Transfer History and Stock Ledger tabs.

issues: DateRangePicker component missing data-testid='date-range-picker' attribute (minor - component works but testid not found)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing /app/backend/seed_data.py with 7 stores and 12 transfers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slice 3 fully validated. History & Ledger screen at /history with two tabs (Transfer History + Stock Ledger). Transfer counts per role: Central=5, Master=6, Outlet=3. Stock Ledger derives item-level movements from transfer details API. Before/After columns show '—' as expected. All filters (status, direction, search, date range) working. Reference links navigate to Transfer Detail. No write actions on this screen. Role-based visibility working correctly - Master cannot see sibling Master transfers, Outlet can only see own transfers.

MUST_HAVE.1_history_route_loads: PASS - /history route loads with History & Ledger screen containing two tabs
MUST_HAVE.2_transfer_history_columns: PASS - All columns present: ID, Date, Source, Destination, Status, Type, Items, Direction, Updated, View action
MUST_HAVE.3_stock_ledger_columns: PASS - All columns present: Date, Store (with type badge), Item, Movement type badge, Direction arrow, Qty, Unit, Before (dash), After (dash), Reference (clickable), Counterparty (with type badge), Reason
MUST_HAVE.4_date_range_filter: PASS - DateRangePicker component present on both tabs
MUST_HAVE.5_status_filter_pills: PASS - 7 clickable pills (Requested, Approved, Dispatched, Received, Partially Received, Cancelled, Rejected) filter the table
MUST_HAVE.6_movement_type_filter: PASS - 4 clickable pills (Transfer Out, Transfer In, Partial Receive, Reversal) filter the ledger
MUST_HAVE.7_search_works: PASS - Transfer History searches by ID/store name, Stock Ledger searches by item/store/reference
MUST_HAVE.8_role_visibility: PASS - Central sees 5 transfers, Master sees 6 (own+child), Outlet sees 3 (own only). Master does NOT see sibling Master transfers
MUST_HAVE.9_transfer_detail_linkage: PASS - Clicking row navigates to /transfer/:id, clicking reference link navigates to /transfer/:id
MUST_HAVE.10_empty_loading_error_states: PASS - Empty state when filters return no results, loading skeleton on initial load

SHOULD_HAVE.1_direction_filter: PASS - All/Incoming/Outgoing on Transfer History, All/In/Out on Stock Ledger
SHOULD_HAVE.2_reason_note_display: PASS - Shows resolution reason for partial receive (e.g., '3kg of Paneer spoiled in transit', 'damaged')
SHOULD_HAVE.3_actor_user_display: PASS - Numeric actor ID shown as fallback where available
SHOULD_HAVE.5_store_context_filter: PASS - Direction toggle filters relative to user's store

CROSS_CHECK.1_no_write_buttons: PASS - No Create/Edit/Delete/Add/New buttons anywhere on History & Ledger screen
CROSS_CHECK.2_no_upward_hierarchy: PASS - Outlet cannot see other stores, Master cannot see Central or sibling Masters in transfer data
CROSS_CHECK.3_no_raw_backend_terms: PASS - UI shows Central Store/Master Store/Outlet (not master/central/franchise)
CROSS_CHECK.4_timestamps_formatted: PASS - All timestamps formatted (e.g., '23 May 2026, 2:10 AM'), no raw ISO strings
CROSS_CHECK.5_sidebar_nav_position: PASS - 'History & Ledger' positioned between 'Pending Queues' and 'Reports'

REGRESSION.1_slice2_screens_work: PASS - Operations Hub loads, Pending Queues loads, Transfer Detail loads
REGRESSION.2_login_logout_all_roles: PASS - Login/logout works for Central, Master, and Outlet accounts
REGRESSION.3_sidebar_navigation: PASS - All nav items work (Operations Hub, Hierarchy Summary, Pending Queues, History & Ledger)
